Name: Average duration of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to the average duration of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time reduction in case duration if Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is avoided, compared to cases with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x7fc9ef3c5750> - AppliesTo.PROCESS and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x7fc9ef3c5790> - AppliesTo.PROCESS filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Percentage of time spent in Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time from the start of the case (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE) to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is performed

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average time spent in activities between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average duration of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to the average duration of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
